title: BUG #18741: Detaching a partition referencing a partitioned table fails with a trigger-related error
poc: CREATE TABLE pt1 (a int PRIMARY KEY) PARTITION BY RANGE (a);
CREATE TABLE p1 PARTITION OF pt1 FOR VALUES FROM (0) TO (1);
CREATE TABLE pt2 (a int) PARTITION BY RANGE (a);
CREATE TABLE p2 (a int, FOREIGN KEY (a) REFERENCES pt1);
ALTER TABLE pt2 ATTACH PARTITION p2 FOR VALUES FROM (0) TO (1);
ALTER TABLE pt2 DETACH PARTITION p2;
key_bug_features: Detaching partition with foreign key triggers fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE pt1 (a int PRIMARY KEY, b text NOT NULL) PARTITION BY RANGE (a);
CREATE TABLE p1 PARTITION OF pt1 FOR VALUES FROM (0) TO (1);
CREATE TABLE pt2 (a int, c numeric CHECK (c >= 0)) PARTITION BY RANGE (a);
CREATE TABLE p2 (a int, FOREIGN KEY (a) REFERENCES pt1 ON DELETE CASCADE);
ALTER TABLE pt2 ATTACH PARTITION p2 FOR VALUES FROM (0) TO (1);
